appliedUpdates.description: Added text_combine_in_use parity gap documentation — Python's locate_offset_in reduces text_len to 1 for text-combine-upright spans but Go does not. Affects CJK vertical-text content only.
Added htmlElementText vs combined_text parity gap documentation — Go's htmlElementText only extracts direct children text while Python's combined_text recursively descends into all descendants.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add reference to m4-yj-to-epub-content-audit.md in AGENTS.md
rejectedObservations.reason: The library file is discoverable via .factory/library/ directory listing. Adding per-file references to AGENTS.md would bloat it — the Key References table already points to .factory/library/ as a category.
